title: Dandadan Custom GUI Pack
description: This is a GUI-only resource pack themed after the show "Dandadan."
body: **![Preview Image](https://i.imgur.com/s0DuUIQ.jpeg)** --- ### **Introduction:** This is a GUI-only resource pack inspired by the anime "Dandadan." It works seamlessly with other resource packs—just place it on top of your current pack. The custom palette includes blue, red, and pink, with unique visuals for every container, including the hot bar. If you spot any bugs, please report them, and I'll fix them right away. **Community Engagement:** Join our [Discord server](https://discord.gg/RvScgzj3Ph) to suggest future packs, participate in anime discussions, and enter monthly giveaways for Discord Nitro! [ ](https://listar-mc.net/) [ ] ### **Feature Highlights:** - **Options Menu:** ![Options Menu](https://i.imgur.com/F1iMMc4.png) - **Anvil:** ![Anvil](https://i.imgur.com/SaFGPT4.png) - **Brewing Stand:** ![Brewing Stand](https://i.imgur.com/QKPi9P1.png) - **Crafting Table:** ![Crafting Table](https://i.imgur.com/iuJwYLC.png) - **Smoker:** ![Smoker](https://i.imgur.com/BJrMcmu.png) - **Dispenser:** ![Dispenser](https://i.imgur.com/jeTOIHe.png) - **Chest:** ![Chest](https://i.imgur.com/w9hHr4l.png) - **Enchantment Table:** ![Enchantment Table](https://i.imgur.com/sUhXsw3.png) - **Cartography Table:** ![Cartography Table](https://i.imgur.com/ld4yRjw.png) - **Villager Trading Menu:** ![Villager Trading Menu](https://i.imgur.com/FMp5WiS.png) **Additional Resources:** - Explore more packs on [ListarMC](https://listarmc.com/) - Join our [Discord server](https://discord.gg/RvScgzj3Ph) to suggest new packs, vote on upcoming designs, and participate in anime discussions. **Thank you for your support! ❤️**
